// ==== Koine/Runtime/DomainInvariantViolationException.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System;

namespace Koine.Runtime;

/// <summary>Thrown when a domain invariant or illegal state transition is violated.</summary>
public sealed class DomainInvariantViolationException : Exception
{
    public string TypeName { get; }
    public string Rule { get; }

    public DomainInvariantViolationException(string type, string rule)
        : base($"Invariant violated on {type}: {rule}") { TypeName = type; Rule = rule; }
}

// ==== Koine/Runtime/IAggregateRoot.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

namespace Koine.Runtime;

/// <summary>Marks an entity as the consistency boundary (root) of an aggregate.</summary>
public interface IAggregateRoot { }

// ==== Koine/Runtime/IDomainEvent.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System;

namespace Koine.Runtime;

/// <summary>A fact that happened in the domain, recorded by an aggregate.</summary>
public interface IDomainEvent
{
    DateTimeOffset OccurredOn { get; }
}

// ==== Koine/Runtime/ValueObject.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;

namespace Koine.Runtime;

/// <summary>Base class for value objects: equality by component value, not reference.</summary>
public abstract class ValueObject
{
    /// <summary>The values that define this value object's identity, in order.</summary>
    protected abstract IEnumerable<object?> GetEqualityComponents();

    public override bool Equals(object? obj)
    {
        if (obj is null || obj.GetType() != GetType())
        {
            return false;
        }
        return GetEqualityComponents().SequenceEqual(((ValueObject)obj).GetEqualityComponents());
    }

    public override int GetHashCode()
    {
        var hash = new HashCode();
        foreach (var component in GetEqualityComponents())
            hash.Add(component);
        return hash.ToHashCode();
    }

    public static bool operator ==(ValueObject? left, ValueObject? right)
        => left is null ? right is null : left.Equals(right);

    public static bool operator !=(ValueObject? left, ValueObject? right)
        => !(left == right);

    /// <summary>Wraps an ordered collection (list) as a by-element equality component.</summary>
    protected static object? Ordered(System.Collections.IEnumerable? items)
        => items is null ? null : new SequenceComponent(items, ordered: true);

    /// <summary>Wraps an unordered collection (set/map) as a by-element equality component.</summary>
    protected static object? Unordered(System.Collections.IEnumerable? items)
        => items is null ? null : new SequenceComponent(items, ordered: false);

    private sealed class SequenceComponent
    {
        private readonly List<object?> _items = new();
        private readonly bool _ordered;

        public SequenceComponent(System.Collections.IEnumerable items, bool ordered)
        {
            _ordered = ordered;
            foreach (var item in items) _items.Add(item);
        }

        public override bool Equals(object? obj)
        {
            if (obj is not SequenceComponent other || _items.Count != other._items.Count)
            {
                return false;
            }
            return _ordered
                ? _items.SequenceEqual(other._items)
                : _items.All(x => _items.Count(i => Equals(i, x)) == other._items.Count(i => Equals(i, x)));
        }

        public override int GetHashCode()
        {
            if (_ordered)
            {
                var hash = new HashCode();
                foreach (var item in _items) hash.Add(item);
                return hash.ToHashCode();
            }
            var acc = 0;
            foreach (var item in _items) acc ^= item?.GetHashCode() ?? 0;
            return acc;
        }
    }
}

// ==== Sales/Abstractions/IUnitOfWork.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

namespace Sales;

/// <summary>Transactional boundary over this context's aggregate repositories.</summary>
public interface IUnitOfWork
{
    IInventoryRepository Inventories { get; }

    Task<int> SaveChangesAsync(CancellationToken ct = default);
}

// ==== Sales/Events/OrderPlaced.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System;
using Koine.Runtime;

namespace Sales;

public sealed record OrderPlaced : IDomainEvent
{
    public OrderId OrderId { get; }
    public DateTimeOffset OccurredOn { get; init; } = DateTimeOffset.UtcNow;

    public OrderPlaced(OrderId orderId)
    {
        OrderId = orderId;
    }
}

// ==== Sales/Inventory.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Koine.Runtime;

namespace Sales;

public sealed class Inventory : IAggregateRoot
{
    public InventoryId Id { get; }
    public int Reserved { get; private set; }

#pragma warning disable CS8618 // EF Core populates members from the store after construction.
    private Inventory() { }
#pragma warning restore CS8618

    public Inventory(InventoryId id, int reserved)
    {
        Id = id;
        Reserved = reserved;
    }

    public void Reserve(OrderId order)
    {
        Reserved = 1;
    }

    public bool Equals(Inventory? other)
        => other is not null && Id.Equals(other.Id);
    public override bool Equals(object? obj)
        => Equals(obj as Inventory);
    public override int GetHashCode()
        => Id.GetHashCode();
    public static bool operator ==(Inventory? left, Inventory? right)
        => left is null ? right is null : left.Equals(right);
    public static bool operator !=(Inventory? left, Inventory? right)
        => !(left == right);
}

// ==== Sales/Policies/ReserveStockPolicy.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

namespace Sales;

/// <summary>Reacts to OrderPlaced via ReserveStock.</summary>
public interface IReserveStockPolicy
{
    Task Handle(OrderPlaced e, CancellationToken ct = default);
}

/// <summary>
/// Policy seam: when OrderPlaced occurs, the intended reaction is
/// Inventory.reserve(order: e.OrderId). Koine does not generate the cross-aggregate call
/// (no imperative logic in the model); implement Handle in a partial to wire it.
/// </summary>
public abstract partial class ReserveStockPolicy : IReserveStockPolicy
{
    /// <remarks>Intended reaction: Inventory.reserve(order: e.OrderId).</remarks>
    public abstract Task Handle(OrderPlaced e, CancellationToken ct = default);
}

// ==== Sales/Repositories/IInventoryRepository.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System.Threading;
using System.Threading.Tasks;

namespace Sales;

/// <summary>Persistence-ignorant repository contract for the Inventory aggregate root.</summary>
public interface IInventoryRepository
{
    Task<Inventory?> GetByIdAsync(InventoryId id, CancellationToken ct = default);

    Task AddAsync(Inventory aggregate, CancellationToken ct = default);

    Task UpdateAsync(Inventory aggregate, CancellationToken ct = default);

    Task RemoveAsync(Inventory aggregate, CancellationToken ct = default);
}

// ==== Sales/Services/Pricing.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

namespace Sales;

/// <summary>A stateless domain service.</summary>
public sealed class Pricing
{
    public Money Discounted(Money amount, decimal rate)
        => amount * rate;
}

// ==== Sales/Specifications/SalesSpecifications.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

namespace Sales;

/// <summary>Reusable domain specifications (predicates) for this context.</summary>
public static class SalesSpecifications
{
    public static bool IsLarge(this Order x)
        => x.LineCount > 10 || x.Total > 1000;
}

// ==== Sales/ValueObjects/InventoryId.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using Koine.Runtime;

namespace Sales;

/// <summary>A strongly-typed identity value object.</summary>
public sealed class InventoryId : ValueObject
{
    public Guid Value { get; }

    public InventoryId(Guid value)
        => Value = value;

    public static InventoryId New()
        => new(Guid.NewGuid());

    protected override IEnumerable<object?> GetEqualityComponents()
    {
        yield return Value;
    }
}

// ==== Sales/ValueObjects/Money.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System.Collections.Generic;
using Koine.Runtime;

namespace Sales;

public sealed class Money : ValueObject
{
    public decimal Amount { get; }

    public Money(decimal amount)
    {
        Amount = amount;
    }

    public static Money operator *(Money left, decimal right)
        => new Money(left.Amount * right);

    public override string ToString()
        => $"Money {{ Amount = {Amount} }}";

    protected override IEnumerable<object?> GetEqualityComponents()
    {
        yield return Amount;
    }
}

// ==== Sales/ValueObjects/Order.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System.Collections.Generic;
using Koine.Runtime;

namespace Sales;

public sealed class Order : ValueObject
{
    public int LineCount { get; }
    public int Total { get; }

    public Order(int lineCount, int total)
    {
        LineCount = lineCount;
        Total = total;
    }

    public override string ToString()
        => $"Order {{ LineCount = {LineCount}, Total = {Total} }}";

    protected override IEnumerable<object?> GetEqualityComponents()
    {
        yield return LineCount;
        yield return Total;
    }
}

// ==== Sales/ValueObjects/OrderId.cs ====
// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using Koine.Runtime;

namespace Sales;

/// <summary>A strongly-typed identity value object.</summary>
public sealed class OrderId : ValueObject
{
    public Guid Value { get; }

    public OrderId(Guid value)
        => Value = value;

    public static OrderId New()
        => new(Guid.NewGuid());

    protected override IEnumerable<object?> GetEqualityComponents()
    {
        yield return Value;
    }
}
